meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode AppSec Village - David Waldrop - The DevOps and Agile Security Toolkit
meta.description: The DevOps & Agile Security Toolkit - In this talk, we will look at integrating security into Agile and DevOps. We will discuss strategies, training, tools, and techniques that will let your organization move quickly while doing so safely.
